title: Aldi Hotel Collection No 16 Oud & Bergamot Luxury Reed Diffuser Set 1 x 100ml
features: Aldi Hotel Collection No 16 Oud & Bergamot Luxury Reed Diffuser Set | 1 x 100ml
A rich scent of dark oud wood and crisp bergamot giving way to cedarwood and praline
Fragrance lasts for up to 2 months
description: Product description Aldi Hotel Collection No 16 Oud & Bergamot Luxury Reed Diffuser Set | 1 x 100ml. A luxury reed diffuser with a high level of fragrance that emanates easily and continously via the reeds to slowly infuse any space with fragrance and create a lovely ambiance for up to 2 months. A rich scent of dark oud wood and crisp bergamot giving way to cedarwood and praline. This luxury reed diffuser contains a beautifully designed coloured glass bottle and 8 black rattan sticks. Directions Place the reed diffuser on a stable, level surface, open the bottle and insert the reeds for the fragrance to disperse into the room Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
